mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction_notification( notification_id, to_user_id, biz_type, target_type, target_id, post_id, root_comment_id, last_actor_user_id, last_comment_id, unread_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES( #{notificationId}, #{toUserId}, #{bizType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{postId}, #{rootCommentId}, #{lastActorUserId}, #{lastCommentId}, #{delta}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unread_count = unread_count + #{delta}, post_id = COALESCE(VALUES(post_id), post_id), root_comment_id = COALESCE(VALUES(root_comment_id), root_comment_id), last_actor_user_id = VALUES(last_actor_user_id), last_comment_id = COALESCE(VALUES(last_comment_id), last_comment_id), update_time = NOW()
